extraction.one_line_summary: ARU Fabio attacked alone at 1.5km to go on Planche des Belles Filles, dropped everyone in an oversized gear for first Tour stage win, FROOME Chris took yellow.
tactical_patterns: ARU Fabio's massive gear attack at 1.5km negates power disadvantage, locks legs briefly mid-effort but recovers cadence to finish.
Team Sky controlled entire Planche des Belles Filles base with six riders yet FROOME Chris couldn't match ARU's acceleration.
MARTIN Dan's counterattack after FROOME's move exploited PORTE Richie's momentary hesitation, taking bonus seconds.
YATES Simon attacked pre-finish showing white jersey contenders race aggressively even without GC threat on short HC climbs.

rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: won in building form (two wins prior two weeks), excels on steep gradients looking light, now genuine GC threat
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: uncharacteristically couldn't follow ARU's acceleration despite perfect cadence and team dominance, less sharp than expected
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: locked up when MARTIN Dan counterattacked, lost time again to FROOME via bonus seconds, marginal on first mountain test
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: attacked aggressively near finish, best-looking white jersey contender, climbed strongest of U25 cohort
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: lost expected time on short steep climb, needs longer ascents to compete effectively
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: timed counterattack perfectly after FROOME moved, overtook PORTE for bonus seconds showing tactical sharpness
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: positive: pulled massive tempo at base for Sky, will be solid domestique rest of tour
